tags.name: Exercises
tags.description:
Exercise endpoints.

Security headers are required for each request which are detailed below.

**Security Headers:**

```
x-raipidapi-key: <key>
x-raipidapi-host: <host>
```

[RapidAPI Key Documentation](https://docs.rapidapi.com/docs/keys-and-key-rotation)

parameters.description: The ID of the exercise
parameters.name: id

get.description: Retrieve an exercise gif from the exercise ID
Get the status of the ExerciseDB Server
Get list of available target muscles

parameters.description: Parameter must be one of: `back`, `cardio`, `chest`, `lower arms`, `lower legs`, `neck`, `shoulders`, `upper arms`, `upper legs`, `waist`

schema.error: Parameter must be one of: back, cardio, chest, lower arms, lower legs, neck, shoulders, upper arms, upper legs, waist
